beak.integration.statmagic.call_bnn module

beak.integration.statmagic.call_bnn._collect_results(cma_id: str, model_run_id: str, output_locations: Tuple[str, ...], output_files: Tuple[str, ...]) → List[Tuple[str, ProspectivityOutputLayer]][source]

Create information for the CDR ProspectivityOutputLayer Class.

Parameters:

  • cma_id – Unique identifier for the CMA.

  • model_run_id – Unique identifier for the model run.

  • output_locations – The output folders and locations for metrics and meta files.

Returns:

List of tuples, where each tuple contains the file path and the related ProspectivityOutputLayer object.

beak.integration.statmagic.call_bnn._get_label_info(data: ndarray | None) → Dict[source]

Get label information for positives and negatives.

Parameters:

data – Input data to count positives and negatives.

Returns:

Dictionary containing count of positives and negatives.

Return type:

dict

beak.integration.statmagic.call_bnn._get_network_parameters(input_size: int, nodes: List[int]) → int[source]

Get the number of parameters in the neural network.

Parameters:

  • input_size – Size of the input layer.

  • nodes – Number of neurons for each layer.

beak.integration.statmagic.call_bnn._get_sampled_labels(label_data: List[Tuple[str, Dict]])[source]

Create a dictionary containing all settings.

Parameters:

label_data – Data and descriptions for labels.

Returns:

Dictionary containing labels processed in the workflow.

Return type:

dict

beak.integration.statmagic.call_bnn.run_bnn(input_layers: List[str], input_labels: str, config_file: str, output_folder: str, random_seed: int = 42) → List[Tuple[str, Dict]][source]

Call the BNN algorithm on input layers using the provided configuration.

Parameters:

  • input_layers – List containing the path of input rasters as strings.

  • input_labels – String containing the path of the input labels.

  • config_file – Path to the JSON configuration file.

  • output_folder – Output folder for the results.

  • random_seed – Random seed for reproducibility.

Returns:

None
